titleStmt.title: SII 36.238: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 238. (A.R. No. 238 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Mēsham, ba. 3, Friday, Anusham = A.D. 1533.)

Gift of the village of Periya Puḷiyavi, surnamed Narasimhapuram and a part of Kūvam alias Thyāgasamudranallur (Narasānāyakkapuram) in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Teṉkarai Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻavaḷanāḍu, for the merit of the king by Tittāra-piḷḷai, on the occasion of the consecration of the image of Lakshmī-Narasimhamūrti in the temple. The lands in the village were divided into 29 shares and distributed among the brāhmaṇas, talaiyāri, and sthānaththār of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājāthirāja rājaparameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Accutaiyadeva mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aṟuḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 145 10 5ṉ meṟ cellāniṉṟa vijaya [samvat*]sarattu meṣaṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum Anucamum peṟṟa śukravārattu ṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu teṉkarai maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu kaṉṟūr ṉāṭṭil kūvamāna tiyākasamudranallūṟku pratiṉāmamāna ṉarasāṉāyakkapurattuṭaṉ kūṭina teṟkup periyapuḷiyāvikku pratināmamāṉa narasiṅhapuram svāmi Accutaiya devamahārāyaṟku tharmmamāka svāmi kāriyattukku kaṟtarāna kāñci
teṟku puḷiyapuram tīttārapiḷḷai lakṣminarasiṅhamurddhi pratiṣṭāveḷaiyile lakṣminarasimhamurddhi śrīhastattiṉāl dhārāpūrvvumākap paṇṇivitta bhudāṉam paṅku 2 10 5 kāṇi mānyattukku paṅkiraṇṭu Ākap paṅkirupatteḻukku nānāgotregyo brāhmaṇebhya gaṇasamkhyai Irupatteḻil govindaiyaṅgāṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu, tirumalaiyaṅgārukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu veṅkaṭattuṟavāṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu narasimhāvāgyārukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Aṉantayaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu ko
ravimātaṇṭappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Oṉṉamāsaṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Aṉṉappaṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Aṉṉampaṭṭarukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu tirumalaipaṭṭarukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu tammappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu tammu tevappanukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu yin=ta koyil stānasamprati Antakālamatattāṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu vasavaya ṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu tātivisavappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu
simhapurattu bāskarapaṭṭarukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Aṇṇāccikku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟum Aṉantayappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu paḷḷikoṇṭa perumāḷukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu talaiyāri veṅkappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu catram vasavappaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Āṉaikku paṭikku paṅkarai maṉaiyoṉṟu ṉāyiṉāṟku paṅkarai maṉaiyoṉṟu gaṅkai paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu kaṇṭuḷūrāppayaṉukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu supāṇilaṅkayaṉukku
Agrahāram paṅkarai maṉaiyoṉṟu jāvukku paṅkarai maṉaiyoṉṟu Arcca karruḷḷiṭṭa stānattāṟku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu kāṇimāṉiyattukku paṅkiraṇṭu Ituvum voppadeva voppā bhaṭṭar putran viśvanāthabhaṭṭarukku paṅkoṉṟu maṉaiyoṉṟu Ākap paṅku 2 10 7m makājanam perukkiṉa paṅku 2m Ākap paṅku 2 10 9m lakṣminārasimha murtati śrīhastattināl ran narasiṅhapura Agrahāram satala ka vinimayamā
Digital edition of SII 36.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
